summary: Frontend testing for TeacherHubPro - PDF Export PORTRAIT orientation and AI Assistant scrollable content. ALL REQUIREMENTS VERIFIED AND PASSED.

issues: Minor: React hydration warnings in console about <th> and <td> elements being children of <span> - does not affect functionality but should be addressed for cleaner code

critical_code_review_comments: PlanPrintView.js correctly implements PORTRAIT orientation (8.5in x 11in) with @page { size: 8.5in 11in; }
Page width is 8in with min-height 10.5in - confirmed portrait layout
All 5 day columns (Lunes, Martes, Miércoles, Jueves, Viernes) fit on one page
All 4 table rows visible: Day Theme, Type of Taxonomy/Webb Levels, Activities, Materials
Checkboxes render with inline styles for consistent preview and print
Standards page (Page 2) has two-column layout with 'Standard: First Week' and 'Standard: Second Week' side by side
Signatures section present at bottom of Standards page
AIAssistant.js line 738 has overflow-y-auto on CardContent for scrollable generated content
Saved Plans tab loads correctly with empty state message
seed_data_creation: Used existing plan 'Unit 3 - The Big Adventure' (plan_bc34a47a) for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: TeacherHubPro PDF export and AI Assistant features are FULLY WORKING. PDF Export verified: 1) PORTRAIT orientation (8.5in x 11in), 2) All 5 day columns fit on one page, 3) All 4 table rows (Day Theme, DOK Levels, Activities, Materials) visible, 4) Standards page has two-column layout, 5) Checkboxes render correctly. AI Assistant verified: 1) Generated content area has overflow-y-auto for scrolling, 2) Saved Plans tab loads correctly.
verification_method: Playwright browser automation with JavaScript DOM evaluation to verify content structure, styles, and visibility
